channel.title: Course Notes on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in Course Notes on Analyst

item.title: OSDF conference 2020
item.description: These are my notes from OSDF con (2020). I didn’t keep the notes from all of the topics.

item.title: GCFA
item.description: Podcasts ✔️ means subscribed, ✅ means I now listen to it regularily SANS DFIR WebCast SANS Stormcenter Digital Forensics Survival Podcast SANS Blueprint Darknet Diaries Blogs Courses Udemy Compute Forensics Udemy Mobile Forensics Udemy Network Forensics Udemy SDF Prefetch Forensics 🍔 Udemy SDF Memory Forensics 1 Udemy SDF Memory Forensics 2 👀 ❗ Udemy SDF RAM Extraction Fundamentals ❗ Udemy SDF LNK Udemy SDF Windows Shellbags Udemy SDF Shimcache Udemy SDF Weblog Udemy SDF Windows Explorer Udemy SDF Shadow Copy Udemy SDF Resolving Attached USBs Udemy SDF Imaging a Mac Fusion Drive (low priority) Udemy SDF Understanding OSX Timestamps (low priority) Udemy Python for Forensics 👀 Cases to study before exam https://digital-forensics.

item.title: Linux Forensics by Magnet Forensics
item.description: These are my course notes from Linux Forensics by Magnet Forensics. Thank you, guys, for sharing!

item.title: Slacking Insider Threats by Magnet Forensics
item.description: These are my course notes from Slacking on insider threat by Magnet Forensics. Thank you, guys, for sharing!

item.title: File System Forensics
item.description: My notes of several forensics books. Including but not limited to “File System Forensic Analysis”.

item.title: Hands-on Experience
item.description: All the challenges I’ve completed and solved 🛠️ - in process, ✔️ - done. Forensics Autopsy 8-Hour Course + DFIR challenge ✔️ Practical Malware Analysis ​l​a​b​s​ ✔️ CrackMe (1 and 2 for interview) ✔️ MacOS problem 2 from here ✔️ Pentest Skillset labs ✔️ BeeWAPP ✔️ InsecureBankv2 ✔️ General Viginear Cipher (Coursera) ✔️

item.title: Library
item.description: All the books and articles that I’ve read and found interesting. 📖 reading now, ✔️ - read.

item.title: Memory Forensics
item.description: This is my course notes from SDF series, Memory Forensics, Part 1, 2 and SDF RAM Extraction Fundamentals.

item.title: Prefetch Forensics
item.description: This is my course notes from Prefetch forensics series. Tools WinPrefetchView To view pretech files (decompressed as well) in GUI.

item.title: Theory Acquisition
item.description: *All the courses I’ve completed 👀 - in process, ✔️ - done, watched and now being digested into articles on the website - 🍔 *

item.title: Dfir Intro
item.description: This is my lecture notes of DFIR intro course. As I learn more that was provided in the course, I’ll add a reference and data.
